description: Population of beings needing Medicine Buddha's healing - physical, mental, and spiritual

targets.name: Hospital Patients Worldwide
targets.description: All beings currently hospitalized with physical illness, injury, or undergoing surgery
targets.intention: May Medicine Buddha's healing blue light fill all hospitals, may every patient be restored to complete health of body and mind

additional_data.estimated_count: Tens of millions hospitalized worldwide at any moment
additional_data.mantra: Om Bekandze Bekandze Maha Bekandze Radza Samudgate Soha

targets.name: Those with Chronic Illness
targets.description: Beings living with chronic conditions - cancer, heart disease, diabetes, autoimmune disorders, long COVID, and others
targets.intention: May all beings with chronic illness find relief, healing, and the support they need to live fully

additional_data.estimated_count: Billions living with chronic disease globally

targets.name: Those with Mental Health Challenges
targets.description: Beings suffering from depression, anxiety, PTSD, schizophrenia, bipolar disorder, and other mental health conditions
targets.intention: May all beings with mental suffering find peace of mind, effective care, and the warmth of connection

additional_data.estimated_count: 970+ million living with mental disorder globally

targets.name: Those Suffering from Addiction
targets.description: Beings caught in addiction to substances or behaviors - seeking freedom but bound by craving
targets.intention: May all beings caught in addiction find freedom, may Medicine Buddha's lapis light dissolve the roots of craving, may they find lasting recovery

additional_data.estimated_count: 400+ million with substance use disorders globally

targets.name: Healthcare Workers - Healing the Healers
targets.description: Doctors, nurses, paramedics, caregivers, and all healthcare workers bearing the weight of others' suffering
targets.intention: May all who care for the sick be replenished, may they be protected from burnout, may their compassionate service be sustained

targets.name: Chronic Pain Sufferers
targets.description: Beings living with persistent chronic pain that limits life and diminishes wellbeing
targets.intention: May all beings in chronic pain find relief, may the healing light ease their suffering and restore ease

additional_data.estimated_count: 1.5+ billion living with chronic pain worldwide
data_sources: IASP - International Association for the Study of Pain

targets.name: Those Without Access to Healthcare
targets.description: Beings in low-resource regions without access to basic medical care, medicines, or sanitation
targets.intention: May all beings have access to healing care, may healthcare equity prevail, may suffering from preventable disease end

additional_data.estimated_count: At least half the world lacks essential health services

targets.name: Those in End-of-Life Care
targets.description: Beings in hospice, palliative care, and the dying process, along with those caring for them
targets.intention: May all those approaching death be free from pain and fear, may they pass peacefully, may they be guided toward liberation

additional_data.estimated_count: 60+ million people require palliative care annually
